changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE fixed_operational_costs ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, role_id integer DEFAULT NULL, user_id integer DEFAULT NULL, business_unit_id integer DEFAULT NULL, rate_type_id integer DEFAULT NULL, rate double precision, percent_of_time double precision, percent_of_budget double precision, comments text DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT pk_fixed_operational_costs PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_fixed_operational_costs_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_fixed_operational_costs_to_role FOREIGN KEY (role_id) REFERENCES roles (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_fixed_operational_costs_to_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_fixed_operational_costs_to_rate_type FOREIGN KEY (rate_type_id) REFERENCES rate_types (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_fixed_operational_costs_to_business_unit FOREIGN KEY (business_unit_id) REFERENCES business_units (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE ); CREATE INDEX i_fixed_operational_costs_organization_id ON fixed_operational_costs (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_fixed_operational_costs_business_unit_id ON fixed_operational_costs (business_unit_id); CREATE INDEX i_fixed_operational_costs_role_id ON fixed_operational_costs (role_id); CREATE INDEX i_fixed_operational_costs_user_id ON fixed_operational_costs (user_id); CREATE INDEX i_fixed_operational_costs_rate_type_id ON fixed_operational_costs (rate_type_id);
